WHO WE ARE

Access Link Limited is a universal investment company whose main focus is to provide our clients with the best possible service, We apply a systematic and quantitative approach to investment management, with the aim of generating high-quality and diversifying profits for our clients. . Our asset management program was created as an opportunity to avoid these risks while guaranteeing quick and high profit to investors. At the same time, you do not need to know the ins and outs of the stock market. You just need to open a deposit and our experienced professionals will work for you.

We provide our clients with a lifetime opportuinity to invest in a profitable and reliable investment platform which is capable of helping anyone to attain true financial independence. Our company lets you control your finances by providing a fast and instant deposit and withdrawal process. We provide investment products and solutions to our clients across the world. Our breadth of investment capabilities is extensive and among the most innovative within the market. The company emphasises strong corporate governance and the provision of first class investor service to a client base which includes many of the world’s leading institutional investors.

Take the bold step today!

We are reliable and affordable

Get Started

Active Strategies

Our managed strategies serve investors who prefer more tailored investment approaches. Access to these strategies are available to all accredited investors. Our actively traded strategies provide managed exposure to digital assets.

Capital Market

Our Capital Markets matches human capital with purpose-built infrastructure and systems to help institutional counterparties and private investors meet their unique liquidity needs through a full suite of trading, risk management, and hedging services.

Instant Withdrawal

Access Link Limited AI System processes all transactions instantly when due. At congested period, the system has learnt to process all on queue

Safe and Secure

A completely new strategy for cryptocurrency arbitrage, in which only you act as the custodian of personal assets.

Bridge your Crypto and Cash

We share a purpose to inspire and build better wealth and finance plan. With our combined tools, skills, resources, expertise, collective passion, and commitment to innovation, we're creating a better financial experience to help individuals and businesses achieve more

Get started with Access Link Limited

Login




GET STARTED

A guide on how to get started and account operational.

1. Open an Account

Open an account by clicking on the Register link on our website and click on the open an accountes button. As soon as the page comes up, enter your personal information, with your email address and chosen password, and that is it. This shouldn't take more than a few minutes. Once you've done that, you'll receive a confirmation from us, and you're done. You're now an official member of our system.

2. Make Deposit

You will need to have make your deposit, and you can do this from the deposit section of your personal account. Choose from any of the investment plans that you like and make a deposit. You're allowed to make as many deposits as you see fit. However, every deposit is treated as a separate investment.

3. Watch your investment grow

As soon as you've made your deposits, there is nothing else to do, except watch your earnings accrue according to the earning schedule of the plan that you have made deposit into. This can be fun, because it means you can be anywhere you want to be in the world, and your interest will still be added to your account daily, without you doing anything.

4. Initiate Withdrawals

It doesn't take more than a few seconds to initiate your withdrawals and have your earnings paid to you. All your withdrawals are process within few minutes, and your withdrawal request will be processed to your provided wallet address..

5. Refer Your Friends

You don't need an active deposit to take advantage of our affiliate offer. As long as you've signed up as a member, you can obtain your personal affiliate link from your personal account and share it with your friends. You get 10% first level commission for different plans as soon as they join and make their first deposit.

Legal Company

Access Link Limited, We Are Leaders In The Asset Management Industry! A place for everyone who wants to simply invest in cryptocurrency.

Cryptocurrency

We now offers all traders the opportunity to trade a wide range of the top ranked digital coins 24/7*. Today cryptocurrencies have become known to most people.

Blockchain Technology

With blockchain technology, we believe that more of everything in the world will become money-like: fungible, liquid, and quantified.

Digital Automations

We engage clients on a new level of asset management experience, accessible from anywhere, anytime.

Added Value

We allow customers to take the reins of their money management and make better financial decisions.

Digital Asset Investments

Digital Investment Solutions

Our investment management specializes in digital assets. We enable investors to gain exposure to a new asset class through traditional financial products that are fully embedded in new digital banking setup.

We believe investors should have access to innovation and benefit from owning what could be the most innovative companies of our lifetime.

WHY MANY INVESTORS CHOOSE US

INVESTMENT FUND SECURITY

All investors fund is strongly secured in our platform. We use world best trading securities, our strong firewall protect all user details.

INVESTMENT ADVISORY

We have financial professionals that make investment recommendations and conduct security analysis on trade

TRADING AND FUND MANAGEMENT

We are expert forex traders, we manage your fund and raise good profit for you. Our trading capability is recognised all over the world.

MULTI CURRENCY TRADING

We accept different currencies, so it is very easy for our investors to invest with any currency of their choice. This why investors love us.

ADVANCE REFERRALS PROGRAM

We offer best and advance referral program, this helps our investors to earn more. First level Referral - 10% Second level Referral 10%

RISK MANAGEMENT

We understand all risk management techniques and therefore apply this while trading. This is the reason why we come out with best result

FAQ

  • What is Access Link Limited?

    Access Link Limited is a full digital investment company accessible via your smartphones and other smart devices. It offers easy, fast and reliable solutions designed not only to meet your investment needs but to ultimately improve the quality of your life.

  • What are the benefits of Access Link Limited?

    Access Link Limited allows you to control where, when and how your cryptocurrencies yield interest. With Access Link Limited, you can finally say goodbye to volatility, as we acts as a hedge against unexpected market outcomes or sharp declines in crypto prices.

  • Who can use Access Link Limited?

    Individuals (18 years and above), Institutional and Organizational Investors, Corporates.

  • How to make withdrawal?

    First, your depost must have stayed 7 days or more with it's accumulation depending on the plan. You can click on update wallet address and make sure your wallet address with which you want to withdraw the money to is valid. Click on request for withdrawal and enter the amount you wish to withdraw. Admin will make this payment to your provide wallet address and deposit proof will be sent.

  • How to make deposit?

    Login to your account with your username and password. click on make deposit and select the plan, coins to pay with and the amount you wish to pay. If you haven't added your wallet address to the cryptocurrency you wish to pay with, you will be prompted to add them and it's recommended. On the next page, confirm your deposit and proceed to make payment. A QRcode will generated, scan with your payment app or copy the wallet address if no QRcode is generated and make your payment. Your account will be updated once the admin approves your payment..

  • Where do you generate the interest you pay?

    We engage in Real Estate, Shipping of Goods and Services, Gold Minning, CFDS on stocks, ETFs, Purchasing of top Government bonds , recycling of waste materials and Bitcoin Minning; these and other several resources are the ways we raise money to pay you.

  • How does my interest accumulate?

    Your investment are calculated based on your investment plans you chose during your payment. Our plans are listed above and their accumulatioin per day is as well listed.

What client says

“⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ I’ve been investing with Access Link Limited for six months now, and the experience has been nothing short of amazing! The returns are consistent, and the platform is super user-friendly. Highly recommend to anyone looking to grow their savings!"

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ "This platform truly delivers on its promises. I started small, just to test the waters, and now I’ve doubled my initial investment. Their customer support is excellent and always available to assist. Five stars from me!"

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ "Access Link Limited is a game changer! The transparency and regular updates about my investments give me peace of mind. I’m thrilled with the consistent returns and professional service."

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ "I’ve tried a few investment platforms before, but this one stands out. While I wish the withdrawal process was a bit faster, the returns are worth the wait. Great experience so far!"

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ "I’ve recommended this platform to my friends and family because of its reliability and the excellent returns I’ve received. The process is straightforward, and the team is always ready to help with queries. Perfect for beginners and experienced investors alike!"

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ "What I love most about Access Link Limited is how transparent and professional they are. I was initially skeptical, but after my first payout, I’m completely sold. Excellent platform for anyone looking to grow their money!"
